products.name: Classic Blue Ballpoint Pen
products.description: Smooth-writing ballpoint pen with comfortable grip and reliable blue ink. Perfect for everyday writing tasks.

products.name: Premium Gel Pen Set (5-pack)
products.description: Set of 5 vibrant gel pens with fine 0.5mm tips. Ideal for note-taking, journaling, and detailed writing.

products.name: Executive Fountain Pen
products.description: Elegant fountain pen with stainless steel nib and refillable ink cartridge. A sophisticated writing instrument.

products.name: Red Ink Ballpoint Pen
products.description: Reliable red ballpoint pen for marking, editing, and grading. Consistent ink flow with long-lasting cartridge.

products.name: Multi-Color Retractable Pen
products.description: 4-in-1 retractable pen with black, blue, red, and green ink. Switch colors with a click for color-coded notes.

products.name: HB Graphite Pencil (12-pack)
products.description: Classic HB pencils for writing and sketching. Pre-sharpened with break-resistant lead and smooth finish.

products.name: Mechanical Pencil 0.5mm
products.description: Precision mechanical pencil with cushioned grip and built-in eraser. Auto-advancing lead mechanism.

products.name: Colored Pencil Set (24 colors)
products.description: Vibrant set of 24 colored pencils with soft cores for smooth blending. Great for art projects and coloring.

products.name: Carpenter's Pencil Set (6-pack)
products.description: Flat-body carpenter pencils with durable, thick graphite core. Perfect for marking on rough surfaces.

products.name: Charcoal Drawing Pencils (Set of 6)
products.description: Professional-grade charcoal pencils in assorted grades for expressive sketching and shading.

products.name: A5 Hardcover Lined Notebook
products.description: 192-page hardcover notebook with ruled lines, ribbon bookmark, and elastic closure. Acid-free paper.

products.name: Spiral-Bound A4 Notebook
products.description: 80-sheet spiral notebook with perforated pages and wide-ruled lines. Durable plastic cover.

products.name: Dotted Grid Journal
products.description: Dot grid journal perfect for bullet journaling, planning, and creative layouts. 160gsm thick paper.

products.name: Pocket Memo Pad (3-pack)
products.description: Compact pocket-sized memo pads with 50 sheets each. Fits easily in a pocket or bag for on-the-go notes.

products.name: Kraft Cover Sketchbook A4
products.description: 110-page sketchbook with heavyweight 200gsm paper. Kraft cover for a natural, eco-friendly look.

products.name: Dual-Tip Marker Set (12 colors)
products.description: Double-ended markers with fine and broad tips. Water-based ink for coloring, illustration, and design.

products.name: Permanent Black Marker (3-pack)
products.description: Quick-drying, waterproof permanent markers with chisel tips. Writes on most surfaces including plastic and metal.

products.name: Whiteboard Markers (Set of 4)
products.description: Low-odor dry-erase markers in black, blue, red, and green. Easy to wipe, vivid colors.

products.name: Pastel Highlighter Set (6 colors)
products.description: Soft pastel highlighters with chisel tips. Gentle on the eyes while still making text stand out.

products.name: Neon Highlighter (5-pack)
products.description: Bright neon highlighters in yellow, orange, pink, green, and blue. Long-lasting ink that won't dry out.

products.name: Classic White Eraser (3-pack)
products.description: Soft PVC-free erasers that remove graphite cleanly without smudging or tearing paper.

products.name: Kneaded Art Eraser
products.description: Pliable kneaded eraser for precision erasing and lightening in drawing. Moldable to any shape.

products.name: Electric Eraser with Refills
products.description: Battery-powered electric eraser for precise correction. Comes with 20 replacement refills.

products.name: Transparent Ruler 30cm
products.description: Clear plastic ruler with centimeter and millimeter markings. Shatter-resistant with beveled edge.

products.name: Metal Ruler 40cm
products.description: Stainless steel ruler with cork backing to prevent slipping. Dual cm/inch markings for precision.

products.name: Geometry Set with Compass
products.description: Complete geometry set including compass, protractor, set squares, and ruler in a protective case.

products.name: Desktop Stapler
products.description: Full-strip stapler that fastens up to 25 sheets at once. Built-in staple remover and non-slip base.

products.name: Mini Stapler with Staples
products.description: Compact mini stapler with 1000 staples included. Portable and lightweight for bags and desks.

products.name: Staple Refills (5000 pcs)
products.description: Standard 24/6 staples compatible with most desktop staplers. Box of 5000 for long-lasting use.

products.name: Stainless Steel Scissors 21cm
products.description: Sharp stainless steel blades with ergonomic soft-grip handles. Ideal for paper, cardboard, and fabric.

products.name: Children's Safety Scissors
products.description: Rounded-tip scissors designed for safe use by kids. Colorful handles with spring-assist mechanism.

products.name: Transparent Adhesive Tape
products.description: Crystal-clear adhesive tape roll 19mm x 33m. Invisible on paper with easy tear and strong hold.

products.name: Masking Tape 25mm
products.description: Removable masking tape for clean edges in painting and crafts. Easy to tear by hand, leaves no residue.

products.name: Washi Tape Set (10 rolls)
products.description: Decorative washi tape set with various patterns. Repositionable and great for scrapbooking and decoration.

products.name: Double-Sided Tape Roll
products.description: Strong double-sided adhesive tape for mounting and crafting. 12mm x 25m roll.

products.name: Manila File Folder (10-pack)
products.description: Classic manila folders with reinforced tabs. Letter-size, 1/3 cut for organized filing.

products.name: A4 Ring Binder (3-ring)
products.description: Durable 3-ring binder with D-ring mechanism and clear overlay cover. Holds up to 250 sheets.

products.name: Expanding File Organizer
products.description: Accordion-style expanding file with 12 pockets and labeled tabs. Keeps documents sorted and portable.

products.name: Clear Document Sleeves (50-pack)
products.description: Transparent A4 document pockets with top opening. Protects papers while keeping them visible.

products.name: Classic Yellow Sticky Notes (3x3)
products.description: Pack of 12 pads with 100 sheets each. Repositionable adhesive that sticks securely without leaving marks.

products.name: Colored Sticky Notes Cube
products.description: 400-sheet cube of sticky notes in assorted pastel colors. Great for reminders and quick messages.

products.name: Sticky Page Markers (5 colors)
products.description: Narrow sticky tabs for marking pages in books and documents. 500 tabs in 5 neon colors.

products.name: Paper Clips Box (200 pcs)
products.description: Standard 28mm nickel-plated paper clips. Smooth finish for easy sliding and secure document holding.

products.name: Colored Paper Clips (100 pcs)
products.description: Vinyl-coated paper clips in assorted colors. Add a splash of color to your organization.

products.name: Binder Clips Assorted (48 pcs)
products.description: Mixed-size binder clips in small, medium, and large. Strong grip for holding stacks of paper together.

products.name: Correction Tape Roller
products.description: Dry correction tape for instant coverage. 5mm x 8m tape with ergonomic applicator body.

products.name: Correction Fluid Bottle
products.description: Quick-drying correction fluid with foam brush applicator. Covers mistakes smoothly for easy rewriting.

products.name: A4 Copy Paper Ream (500 sheets)
products.description: Multipurpose 80gsm white copy paper suitable for printing, copying, and everyday office use.

products.name: Legal Pad Yellow Lined (3-pack)
products.description: Classic wide-ruled legal pads with 50 tear-off sheets each. Chipboard backing for sturdy writing surface.

products.name: Colored Cardstock Pack (50 sheets)
products.description: Assorted color cardstock in 10 vibrant shades. 160gsm weight ideal for crafts, printing, and presentations.
